summary_one_line: A structurally valid IHDR plus a parseable PLTE chunk so libpng internally allocates the palette and sets the PNG_FREE_PLTE free_me bit.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed PNG header whose IHDR fields (width 0x5b, height 0x45, bit_depth 0x08, color_type 0x06) and chunk length/CRC bytes survive validation so that downstream PLTE-chunk handling internally allocates info_ptr->palette and sets the PNG_FREE_PLTE bit in info_ptr->free_me; only then does (mask & PNG_FREE_PLTE) & free_me evaluate non-zero (the blocked true side at png.c:649).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All 10 winner seeds carry an intact IHDR — offset 0x13 is 0x5b ([) in 10/10, 0x17 is 0x45 (E) in 10/10, 0x18 is 0x08 in 9/10, 0x1d is 0x52 (R) in 10/10, 0x1e is 0xed in 10/10 — yielding a consistent dimensions/color-type/CRC region that parses cleanly; the per-role overlay shows the true side at 649 is reached only in W (T=10 F=28 for W vs T=0 F=23 for L) and the palette-freeing body lines 650-654 are W-only.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds scatter those same header fields — offset 0x16 is a0/00/80/02, 0x17 is 86/00/45/03, 0x18 is 10/08/04/02, 0x1d is 7f/00/52/ff, 0x1e adds ff/00 — corrupting IHDR length/dimensions/CRC so the parse never reaches a valid PLTE allocation; at png.c:649 the loser only ever takes the false side (T=0 F=23), so info_ptr->palette is never internally allocated and PNG_FREE_PLTE stays clear in free_me.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer of operands from libpng's chunk-length/CRC/signature integer comparisons and substitutes the expected operand at the matching input offsets, repairing the IHDR/chunk fields so the PNG parses far enough to allocate the palette; naive has only havoc/token mutators and no CMP introspection, so it cannot reliably reconstruct the multi-field valid header and stays blocked in 10/10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is a bitmask test of mask & PNG_FREE_PLTE against info_ptr->free_me whose true side is globally blocked.
The true (palette-freeing) side at 649 and its body are reached only by winner-resolving seeds.
At branch 649 the winner takes the true side ten times while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 649  T=10 F=28  T=0 F=23  if (((mask & PNG_FREE_PLTE) & info_ptr->free_me) != 0)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry a consistent intact IHDR field region.
Loser seeds scatter the IHDR dimension/length bytes that winners hold constant.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes one logged CMP operand at offsets where the other operand matches.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has only havoc and token mutators with no I2S capability.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3817 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 013b9f2a08a04135` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 6 of the 7-level ancestor chain; the tool's trailing summary reported `1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 6`, direct lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in this cmplog seed's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A naive (no-I2S) trial reaching the true side at png.c:649 in a comparable fraction of trials, or a synthetic harness where corrupting only IHDR/chunk-length CMP-checked fields fails to gate cmplog's advantage over naive.

weakest_evidence_point: The mapping from input header bytes to the runtime info_ptr->free_me PNG_FREE_PLTE bit is inferred from source structure and per-role coverage, not directly traced, so I cannot prove the specific CMP whose operands I2S repaired.
